MINI MINUTES FOR APR-29-2021 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE APR-29-2021 HEARING RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE PETITION FOR AN ORDER COMPELLING RESPONDENT SOUTHERN TRINITY HEALTH SERVICES TO COMPLY WITH THE INVESTIGATIONAL SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED, AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/EPS)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON PETITION FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AND FOR ORDER COMPELLING COMPLIANCE WITH INVESTIGATIONAL SUBPOENA [HEARING DATE: 4/29/2021 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT 302 FOR RESPONDENT TRINITY HEALTH SERVICES TO SHOW CAUSE WHY THEY HAE NOT PRODUCED THE DOCUMENTS AS REQUIRED BY THE INVESTIGATIONAL SUBPOENA ISSUED BY THE MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA; RESPONDENT MAY FILE OPPOSING PAERS ON OR BEFORE APRIL 16,2021. PETITIONER MAY FILE REPLY PAPERS ON OR BEFORE APRIL 22, 2021. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

calendar.matters:
Order To Show Cause (Per Ex Parte Order Filed 4/7/2021)
Off Calendar Apr-29-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: Order To Show Cause.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The petition for an order compelling respondent Southern Trinity Health Services to comply with the investigational subpoena duces tecum is granted. No opposition filed, and good cause shown.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
